---
name: "\U0001F680 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new idea, integration, or improvement for AgriPortal.
title: "[FEATURE] - Brief title for the suggestion"
labels: enhancement
assignees: AyTech-Solution

---

## 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem or limitation is. (e.g., "I'm frustrated because the login form lacks a show/hide password toggle...")

## 🎯 Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. What new feature or enhancement should be added?

## ⚡ Use Cases & Benefits
How will this feature help the users or improve the authentication flow of the AgriPortal ecosystem?

## 🎨 Design Mockups / Concept (Optional)
If applicable, add screenshots, wireframes, or link design references (like Canva/Figma layouts) to explain the visual concept.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, technical references, or ideas about the feature request here.
